name: Effaclar Duo+M
ai_reason: Contains Salicylic Acid and Niacinamide in the top 6 ingredients to directly target active breakouts while Zinc PCA regulates sebum production.

name: Foaming Facial Cleanser
ai_reason: Ceramides and Hyaluronic Acid reinforce the skin barrier while Niacinamide helps calm redness — ideal for compromised moisture barrier repair.

name: Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
ai_reason: 10% Niacinamide paired with Zinc PCA directly targets excess sebum and enlarged pores — perfectly aligned with oily, acne-prone skin goals.

name: Skin Perfecting 2% BHA Liquid Exfoliant
ai_reason: 2% Salicylic Acid in a leave-on formula penetrates deep into pores to dissolve congestion and prevent future breakouts — a top-tier acne treatment.

name: Advanced Snail 96 Mucin Power Essence
ai_reason: Snail mucin combined with Panthenol and Allantoin accelerates scar healing and calms inflammation — excellent for post-acne redness and scarring.

name: Cicaplast Baume B5+
ai_reason: Panthenol and Madecassoside work synergistically to repair irritated skin while Shea Butter provides deep moisture without clogging pores.

name: Moisturizing Cream
ai_reason: Three essential ceramides and Hyaluronic Acid restore the lipid barrier and lock in hydration — best for dry, compromised, or sensitive skin types.

name: Unseen Sunscreen SPF 40
ai_reason: Weightless chemical sunscreen with a primer-like finish that protects against UVA/UVB without any white cast — perfect for daily wear over treatment products.

name: Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
ai_reason: 10% Azelaic Acid targets both acne and hyperpigmentation while calming redness — a dual-action ingredient for post-inflammatory erythema and blemishes.

name: C-Firma Fresh Day Serum
ai_reason: Stabilized Vitamin C derivative paired with Ferulic Acid brightens hyperpigmentation and evens skin tone — most effective for dullness and dark spots.

name: Green Tea Seed Hyaluronic Serum
ai_reason: Antioxidant-rich fermented green tea water provides deep hydration while Sodium Hyaluronate plumps the skin — suitable for dehydrated, sensitive skin.

name: Hydrating Facial Cleanser
ai_reason: Non-foaming cream cleanser with Ceramides and Hyaluronic Acid that cleanses without stripping — excellent for compromised or dry sensitive skin types.

name: Matcha Hemp Hydrating Cleanser
ai_reason: Low-foaming gel cleanser with antioxidant-rich Matcha and Hemp Seed Oil that calms inflammation while gently cleansing — great for redness-prone skin.

name: Hydro Boost Water Gel
ai_reason: Oil-free gel moisturizer with Hyaluronic Acid delivers a hydration burst without heaviness — adequate for normal skin but lacks barrier-repair lipids.

name: CALM Redness Relief Moisturizer
ai_reason: Licorice root extract and Allantoin actively reduce visible redness while Ceramides repair the skin barrier — purpose-built for sensitive, reactive skin.

name: Gentle Skin Cleanser
ai_reason: Classic gentle cleanser that effectively removes impurities without stripping the skin, but the parabens and SLS may be irritating for very reactive skin.

name: Glycolic Acid 7% Exfoliating Toner
ai_reason: 7% Glycolic Acid provides chemical exfoliation that smooths texture and fades hyperpigmentation over time — best for dull or sun-damaged skin.

name: UV Clear Broad-Spectrum SPF 46
ai_reason: Niacinamide-infused mineral sunscreen that protects against UV damage while actively treating acne and hyperpigmentation — a multi-functional daily essential.

name: Squalane + Probiotic Gel Moisturizer
ai_reason: Squalane mimics the skin's natural sebum while probiotics support the microbiome — ideal for balancing combination skin without triggering breakouts.

name: Discoloration Correcting Serum
ai_reason: Tranexamic Acid combined with Niacinamide and Vitamin C targets stubborn hyperpigmentation from multiple pathways — highly effective for post-acne marks.

name: Toleriane Double Repair Face Moisturizer
ai_reason: Prebiotic thermal water, Ceramides, and Niacinamide work together to restore the skin barrier and soothe irritation — excellent for sensitive, allergy-prone skin.

name: Perfect UV Sunscreen Mild Milk SPF 50+
ai_reason: 100% mineral UV filter formula designed specifically for sensitive skin — Zinc Oxide and Titanium Dioxide provide broad-spectrum protection without chemical irritants.

name: Salicylic Acid Daily Gentle Cleanser
ai_reason: 0.5% Salicylic Acid in a daily cleanser gently exfoliates pores without over-drying — a staple morning cleanse for maintaining clear, blemish-free skin.

name: Centella Green Level Buffet Serum
ai_reason: Centella Asiatica is the #1 ingredient with Madecassoside to calm inflammation and repair the skin barrier — purpose-formulated for redness and sensitivity.

name: Ultra Sheer Dry-Touch SPF 70
ai_reason: High SPF 70 protection in a Dry-Touch format that won't feel greasy, but the chemical UV filter cocktail may cause stinging on very sensitive or barrier-damaged skin.

name: Purity Made Simple One-Step Facial Cleanser
ai_reason: Multi-tasking cleanser that removes makeup while gently exfoliating, but the strong surfactant base may disrupt the moisture barrier in already compromised skin.

name: Polyglutamic Acid Dewy Sunscreen SPF 30
ai_reason: Polyglutamic Acid provides superior hydration retention compared to Hyaluronic Acid while SPF 30 protects daily — a solid everyday maintenance sunscreen.

name: Beste No. 9 Jelly Cleanser
ai_reason: pH-balanced jelly cleanser with gentle surfactants and Ceramides that cleanses without stripping — a universally safe option but lacks targeted treatment benefits.

name: C E Ferulic
ai_reason: Gold-standard 15% Vitamin C with Ferulic Acid provides potent antioxidant protection and visible brightening — unmatched for photoaging and hyperpigmentation correction.

name: Resurfacing Retinol Serum
ai_reason: Encapsulated Retinol with three Ceramides and Licorice Root Extract resurfaces skin texture and fades marks while the delivery system minimizes irritation.

name: Anthelios Melt-in Milk Sunscreen SPF 100
ai_reason: Very high SPF 100 protection in a cosmetically elegant milk format — offers reliable daily UV defense though the chemical filter blend may irritate ultra-sensitive skin.

name: Natural Moisturizing Factors + HA
ai_reason: Comprehensive moisturizer duplicating the skin's Natural Moisturizing Factors with Amino Acids and Ceramides — basic but effective maintenance for normal skin.

name: Creamy Jelly Cleanser
ai_reason: Squalane-based cream cleanser with Ceramides and Panthenol supports the moisture barrier while cleansing effectively — ideal for dry, dehydrated, or sensitive skin.

name: Probiotic Skin Care Ultra Hydrating Day & Night Cream
ai_reason: Probiotic ferment supports a healthy skin microbiome while Squalane and Ceramides moisturize — beneficial for balance but the price is premium for standard actives.

name: Salicylic Acid + Tea Tree Body Wash
ai_reason: Effective body cleanser for chest and back acne with Salicylic Acid and Tea Tree Oil, though high sulfate content may be overly stripping for facial use.

name: Clearly Corrective Dark Spot Solution
ai_reason: Activated Vitamin C derivative combined with Peony extract targets dark spots and uneven tone with gradual, visible improvement over consistent use.

name: Moisturizing Cream
ai_reason: Free of virtually every common irritant (fragrance, dyes, lanolin, parabens, formaldehyde) — clinically proven for even the most reactive, allergy-prone skin.

name: Universal Tinted Moisturizer SPF 46
ai_reason: Mineral tinted SPF with adaptive color technology provides sheer coverage while Zinc Oxide protects — a daily multi-tasker that replaces both sunscreen and light foundation.

name: Glass Skin Refining Serum
ai_reason: Peptide-infused serum with Niacinamide and multiple molecular weights of Hyaluronic Acid creates a plumping, glass-like finish — good for general luminosity.

name: Calm + Restore Nourishing Oat Cleanser
ai_reason: Prebiotic colloidal oatmeal physically calms irritation while Ceramides restore the barrier — clinically shown to reduce redness in sensitive skin conditions like eczema.

name: Toleriane Purifying Foaming Face Wash
ai_reason: Niacinamide and Zinc PCA in a gentle foaming cleanser purge excess oil without stripping the barrier — specifically formulated for oily, blemish-prone sensitive skin.

name: Daily UV Defense SPF 36
ai_reason: Lightweight mineral SPF with Green Tea Seed Oil providing antioxidant protection — a decent daily sunscreen but SPF 36 is lower than recommended for prolonged sun exposure.

name: Ultimate Nourishing Rice Overnight Spa Mask
ai_reason: Rice Bran Water and Niacinamide provide brightening and nourishing benefits in a sleeping mask format — a complementary product but not a standalone moisturizer.

name: Protini Polypeptide Moisturizer
ai_reason: Signal peptides (Tripeptide-1, Tetrapeptide-7) stimulate collagen production while Squalane and Ceramides moisturize — excellent for anti-aging and barrier maintenance.

name: Mineral Sunscreen SPF 50
ai_reason: Clean mineral SPF formula with a short, understandable ingredient list — Zinc Oxide as the single active filter is gentle yet effective for daily face protection.

name: AHA-BHA-PHA 30 Days Miracle Toner
ai_reason: Triple-acid toner (AHA, BHA, PHA) provides comprehensive exfoliation but may overwhelm very sensitive or newly-treated skin — best for experienced acid users.

name: Hydra Vizor Invisible Moisturizer SPF 30
ai_reason: SPF 30 and Niacinamide in a sheer, universally-tinted moisturizer that works on all skin tones — good daily protection with a natural finish.

name: Aloe BHA Skin Toner
ai_reason: Aloe-based toner with 0.5% Salicylic Acid and Snail Mucin provides gentle exfoliation alongside soothing hydration — a balanced option for combination acne-prone skin.

name: Ultra Repair Cream Intense Hydration
ai_reason: Colloidal Oatmeal and Shea Butter provide immediate relief for dry, irritated skin while Ceramides and Squalane lock in moisture for up to 24 hours.

name: Cicalfate+ Restorative Protective Cream
ai_reason: Post-biotic Avène Thermal Water combined with Copper-Zinc sulfate complex creates an optimal healing environment for compromised skin — ideal post-procedure or for active rashes.
